rationale.fidelity: Fully preserves known morning jobs, qualified assignments, compatibility, hours, exclusivity, deterministic scope, and scheduled-value objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes scarce certified hours and job-value opportunity cost concrete and operational.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Appropriately marks novelty and broader importance as provisional without supplied literature or evidence.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly rejects emergency robustness and materiality claims and clearly identifies unmodeled operational features.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear but substantially more framework-heavy and verbose than necessary.
rationale.overall: A fully faithful and well-bounded assignment framing with avoidable template overhead.
